# Phantom

> Open-source CLI that lets AI coding agents use your API keys safely. Replaces real secrets in .env files with worthless phantom tokens (phm_...) and injects real credentials at the network layer via a local HTTP proxy. The AI never sees real secrets.

Phantom solves the problem of AI coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot) reading .env files and leaking API keys via LLM context windows, session logs, or training data. It uses a "phantom token proxy" pattern: real secrets are stored in an encrypted vault (OS keychain or ChaCha20-Poly1305 encrypted file), the .env is rewritten with worthless phm_ tokens, and a local reverse proxy intercepts API calls to swap tokens for real credentials before forwarding over TLS.

Key features: session-scoped tokens (fresh per exec session), auto-detection of 13+ API services, platform sync (push/pull to Vercel and Railway), MCP server for native Claude Code integration, pre-commit hook, encrypted vault, and npm install support (npx phantom-secrets).

## Documentation

- [Getting Started Guide](https://github.com/ashlrai/phantom-secrets/blob/main/docs/getting-started.md): Step-by-step setup for Next.js + Claude Code + Vercel
- [Troubleshooting & FAQ](https://github.com/ashlrai/phantom-secrets/blob/main/docs/troubleshooting.md): Common issues, CI/CD usage, team workflows
- [Security Model](https://github.com/ashlrai/phantom-secrets/blob/main/SECURITY.md): Threat model, mitigations, and security principles
- [README](https://github.com/ashlrai/phantom-secrets/blob/main/README.md): Full feature list, architecture, and CLI reference

## Installation

- npm: `npx phantom-secrets init`
- Homebrew: `brew tap ashlrai/phantom && brew install phantom`
- Cargo: `cargo install phantom --git https://github.com/ashlrai/phantom-secrets`

## CLI Commands

- `phantom init` — Import .env secrets into vault, rewrite with phantom tokens
- `phantom exec -- <cmd>` — Start proxy + run command with session-scoped tokens
- `phantom sync --platform vercel` — Push secrets to deployment platforms
- `phantom pull --from vercel` — Pull secrets from platforms into local vault
- `phantom setup` — Configure Claude Code MCP server automatically
- `phantom check` — Pre-commit hook to block leaked secrets
- `phantom reveal <KEY>` — View a secret value (requires --yes in non-interactive)
- `phantom list` — Show secret names (never values)
- `phantom doctor` — Health check for config, vault, and .env status
